title: WebSocket connection lost during embedding requests
symptom: The n8n UI shows a 'WebSocket connection lost' error while processing embedding requests. This occurs when sending large amounts of data to the OpenAI API.
not_this_if: Running on a higher resource plan
root_cause: The n8n server is likely overwhelmed due to the high volume of requests being sent to the OpenAI embeddings API, especially on a low-resource plan. This can cause the WebSocket connection to drop unexpectedly, leading to execution failures.
fix_steps: Add a Wait node or batching mechanism between embedding calls
Monitor the server's resource usage during execution
Consider upgrading the n8n plan or running locally if issues persist
agent_instruction: Implement a delay between embedding requests to reduce server load.
